issues.title: Order Management API integration conflict: product-spec.md vs. platform addendum
issues.description: project-context/product-spec.md specifies the order-lookup tool should call https://orders.internal.company.com/v1 GET /orders/{order_id} using API-key auth (header X-API-Key: <key>). project-context/addendum-notes-2026-07-08.md (platform team note) states the Order Management API has since migrated to OAuth2 client-credentials auth at a new base URL https://orders-v2.internal.company.com (token endpoint /oauth/token, bearer token on requests) and that the old API-key path is being sunset. These are mutually exclusive integration specs (different base URL, different auth mechanism/credentials, different token-refresh handling). The order-lookup tool cannot be implemented without knowing which is authoritative.
issues.impact: Blocks Phase 7 order-lookup tool implementation. Also affects config/secrets setup (API key vs. OAuth client_id/client_secret) and may affect the hard constraint 'no PII may leave our AWS VPC' depending on where token exchange happens.
